mnemonics: Use 'Pandas' to read the 'pan'-oramic view of your data, just like a panda surveys its bamboo forest.
keyPoints: pd.read_csv() is the primary function for reading comma-separated values files.
The read_excel() function is used to import data from Excel spreadsheets.
Always check the data shape and data types after reading a file using .shape and .dtypes.
commonMistakes: Not specifying the correct file path, leading to a FileNotFoundError.
Forgetting to set the header and sep parameters for non-standard CSV files.
